chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P.No.D-4636/2013 Date Order with signature of Judge PRESENT: Mr. Justice Muhammad Ali Mazhar. Mr. Justice Arshad Hussain Khan. Dr.Riazuddin Abro vs. Federation of Pakistan and others. 1. For hearing of main case. 2. For hearing of Misc.29321/2013 3. For hearing of Misc.30964/2013 (stay) 07.10.2016. Mr. Ali Asadullah Bullo, Advocate for the petitioner. ----------- The petitioner has challenged the suspension order dated 11.10.2013 through this Petition. However, learned counsel for the petitioner submits that in the meanwhile suspension order has been withdrawn, therefore, he does not want to proceed further. Petition is dismissed as withdrawn along with pending applications. Judge Judge Jamil
